blockingIssues.description: src/flow/windowMaximized.ts caches maximize-state actors forever by window label even though Window.getCurrent() is captured at actor creation time, so closing and reopening a window with the same label can reuse a stale actor bound to a disposed native window instead of establishing fresh renderer-local ownership.

tests/window_ownership.logic.test.ts does not cover close/reopen with the same window label, leaving VAL-CROSS-004 and the reopen portion of VAL-CONTROLS-007 unverified despite the feature handoff claiming reopen regression coverage.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a mission-library note that any per-window cache keyed only by label must define teardown/recreation semantics for close-reopen cycles because Tauri can reuse labels like main-1.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for now because the observation is derived from a single failed feature review and needs confirmation from the eventual fix path before promoting it to durable shared knowledge.
